label: Subagent • residency direction: local→local (different, handoff ON) unloads + reloads
query: Spawn a DIFFERENT local model than the resident orchestrator, handoff enabled.
notes: LIVE RESIDENCY (RAM-real, machine-specific) — the one direction that does real work. PRODUCTION path (no eval passthrough seam): preloads local orchestrator A so it is GPU-resident, then spawns a DIFFERENT local model B with the Local Orchestrator Handoff ON. SubagentResidency must unload the resident chat model, run B, then reload A → handoffWrapped=true. Peak RAM is captured by the resource-sampled subagent dispatch (the AGENTS.md RAM gate; reviewed, not a tight machine gate). Id is `residency-dir-*` so it stays OUT of FILTER=spawn; run with FILTER=residency-dir-. SKIPS when either local model isn't installed.

subagent.input: Reply with a single short sentence confirming you received this task.
